special_mechanics.name: Character Switching
special_mechanics.description: Player switches control between Yakko, Wakko, and Dot to use their respective powers

special_mechanics.name: Yakko Abilities
special_mechanics.description: Uses paddleball to stun enemies; can push and pull objects like crates

special_mechanics.name: Wakko Abilities
special_mechanics.description: Uses mallet to hit switches, break objects, and light fuses

special_mechanics.name: Dot Abilities
special_mechanics.description: Blows kisses to trigger actions needed for progression

tier_notes: Tier 3 data - only qualitative gameplay information available from Wikipedia. No precise physics parameters documented. Source describes character abilities, level structure, and game mechanics but provides no quantitative movement data.
